description: A farmer wants to analyze data from their on-farm weather station to calculate growing degree days (GDD) for their corn crop.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the daily minimum and maximum temperature data from the weather station since the planting date.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the complete temperature dataset.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the accumulated Growing Degree Days (GDD) for the corn crop.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent calculates the correct GDD value.

nodes.task_description: Compare the current GDD accumulation to the 30-year average to determine if the crop is ahead or behind schedule.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reports that the crop is approximately 5 days ahead of the average development schedule.
